title: Accessible Image Gallery

statement.markdown:
markdown
# Accessible Image Gallery

Your task is to make an image gallery accessible using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

### Requirements
1. Use the `alt` attribute in each `img` tag with a descriptive text.
2. Use the `aria-label` attribute on the container element of each image for screen reader users.
3. Use buttons or any interactive elements to control the gallery.
4. Make sure all the interactive elements are accessible using keyboard navigation.
5. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

constraints: Use only HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Do not use any external libraries or frameworks.
Keep your code organized and readable.

starterCode.html: index.html Accessible Image Gallery

gradingCriteria.description: The application provides a good accessibility experience for users with disabilities.
The application is easy to use and navigate for all users.
The application uses semantic HTML to provide meaning to web content.
The application uses Tailwind CSS to style the UI.
